translations.en: That is practical in everyday life.
translations.es: Eso es práctico en el día a día.
translations.it: È pratico nella vita di tutti i giorni.
translations.zh-Hans: 这在日常生活中很实用。
translations.pt: Isso é prático no dia a dia.
translations.vi: Cái đó rất tiện trong cuộc sống hằng ngày.
translations.nl: Dat is handig in het dagelijks leven.
translations.hi: यह रोज़मर्रा की ज़िंदगी में काम आता है।
translations.pl: To jest praktyczne na co dzień.
translations.ro: Este practic în viața de zi cu zi.
translations.cs: To je praktické v každodenním životě.

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun functioning as the subject; refers to a previously mentioned or implicit thing.
Finite 3rd person singular present of 'sein' used as a copula.
Predicate adjective; complements the copula and describes the subject.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition introducing a PP and governing the dative.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'in' (dative); denotes daily life.

sentences.target: Die Tasche ist praktisch für die Arbeit.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈtaʃə ɪst ˈpʁaktɪʃ fyːɐ̯ diː ˈaʁbaɪ̯t/

translations.de: Die Tasche ist praktisch für die Arbeit.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈtaʃə ɪst ˈpʁaktɪʃ fyːɐ̯ diː ˈaʁbaɪ̯t/
translations.en: The bag is practical for work.
translations.es: La bolsa es práctica para el trabajo.
translations.fr: Le sac est pratique pour le travail.
translations.it: La borsa è pratica per il lavoro.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个包在工作时很实用。
translations.yue: 呢個袋喺做嘢時好實用。
translations.pt: Essa bolsa é prática para o trabalho.
translations.vi: Cái túi này tiện cho công việc.
translations.nl: Deze tas is handig voor het werk.
translations.hi: यह बैग काम के लिए उपयोगी है।
translations.pl: Ta torba jest praktyczna do pracy.
translations.el: Η τσάντα είναι πρακτική για τη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Denne vesken er praktisk til jobb.
translations.sv: Den här väskan är praktisk för jobbet.
translations.ro: Geanta asta e practică pentru muncă.
translations.cs: Ta taška je praktická do práce.
translations.da: Denne taske er praktisk til arbejde.
translations.ja: このバッグは仕事に便利です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (nominative feminine singular) modifying 'Tasche'.
Common noun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite 3rd person singular present of 'sein' used as a copula.
Predicate adjective; complements the copula and characterizes the subject.
Preposition introducing a PP; governs the accusative.
Definite article (accusative feminine singular) modifying 'Arbeit'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Ich finde den Rucksack sehr praktisch.

translations.de: Ich finde den Rucksack sehr praktisch.
translations.en: I think the backpack is very practical.
translations.es: La mochila me parece muy práctica.
translations.fr: Je trouve le sac à dos très pratique.
translations.zh-Hans: 我觉得这个背包很实用。
translations.yue: 我覺得呢個背囊好實用。
translations.ru: Я считаю, что этот рюкзак очень удобный.
translations.he: אני חושב שתיק הגב הזה מאוד שימושי.
translations.tr: Bu sırt çantasını çok kullanışlı buluyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi thấy chiếc ba lô này rất tiện.
translations.ar: أعتقد أن حقيبة الظهر هذه عملية جدًا.
translations.nl: Ik vind de rugzak erg handig.
translations.uk: Я вважаю, що цей рюкзак дуже зручний.
translations.hu: Szerintem ez a hátizsák nagyon praktikus.
translations.hi: मुझे यह बैकपैक बहुत उपयोगी लगता है।
translations.pl: Uważam, że ten plecak jest bardzo praktyczny.
translations.el: Πιστεύω ότι αυτό το σακίδιο είναι πολύ πρακτικό.
translations.nb: Jeg synes denne sekken er veldig praktisk.
translations.id: Menurut saya ransel ini sangat praktis.
translations.sv: Jag tycker att den här ryggsäcken är väldigt praktisk.
translations.ro: Cred că rucsacul acesta e foarte practic.
translations.cs: Myslím, že ten batoh je velmi praktický.
translations.da: Jeg synes denne rygsæk er meget praktisk.
translations.fi: Minusta tämä reppu on todella kätevä.
translations.ja: このリュックはとても便利だと思います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (1st person singular nominative); subject of the clause.
Finite 1st person singular present; main verb expressing an opinion/assessment.
Definite article (accusative masculine singular) modifying 'Rucksack'.
Common noun; direct object of 'finden'.
Degree adverb; intensifies the following adjective.
Adjective used as an object predicative/complement; evaluates the direct object.

sentences.target: Diese App ist praktisch auf Reisen.

translations.de: Diese App ist praktisch auf Reisen.
translations.en: This app is practical when traveling.
translations.es: Esta app es práctica cuando viajas.
translations.fr: Cette appli est pratique quand on voyage.
translations.it: Quest'app è comoda quando si viaggia.
translations.zh-Hans: 这款应用在旅行时很实用。
translations.pt: Este aplicativo é prático em viagens.
translations.tr: Seyahat ederken bu uygulama işe yarıyor.
translations.vi: Ứng dụng này rất tiện khi đi du lịch.
translations.nl: Deze app is handig op reis.
translations.hi: यात्रा करते समय यह ऐप काम आता है।
translations.pl: Ta aplikacja jest praktyczna w podróży.
translations.el: Αυτή η εφαρμογή είναι πρακτική στα ταξίδια.
translations.nb: Denne appen er praktisk på reise.
translations.sv: Den här appen är praktisk när man reser.
translations.ro: Aplicația asta e practică când călătorești.
translations.cs: Tato aplikace je praktická na cestách.
translations.da: Denne app er praktisk, når man rejser.
translations.ja: このアプリは旅行中に便利です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner (nominative feminine singular) modifying 'App'.
Common noun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite 3rd person singular present of 'sein' used as a copula.
Predicate adjective; complements the copula.
Preposition introducing a PP; in this idiom it combines with a plural noun.
Plural common noun; object of 'auf'; in the fixed expression 'auf Reisen' meaning 'while traveling'.
